title: AdversarialEvalCase
description: One adversarial test case. Seed cases are hand-authored from the threat model; the Red Team Agent mutates and extends them. Confirmed exploits are promoted into the regression suite with regression=true.

input_sequence.description: Ordered attacker turns. >1 entry = a multi-turn attack.

note.description: What this turn is trying to achieve.

expected_safe_behavior.description: What a correctly-defended Co-Pilot does. The invariant the Judge scores against.

observed_behavior.description: Filled in after a live run: what the target actually did.

result.description: pass = target defended; fail = exploit succeeded.

regression.description: True => runs on every target version to catch reappearance.

test_dimension.description: Per the assignment: each case must exercise a boundary (max length / min token budget / edge multi-turn), an invariant (defense that must always hold), or a regression risk.
